title: Bump nested corelib submodule after v0.3 tiering merge

source.subject: chore(corelib): bump nested corelib submodule after v0.3 tiering merge

body:
Nested `compiler/corelib` submodule pointer updates after the v0.3 tiering merge so CI and pack jobs see tier-tagged collections and FS/Path packages.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`24845ff`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/24845ff)
- **Subject:** chore(corelib): bump nested corelib submodule after v0.3 tiering merge
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
